args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%stavanger%'
LIMIT 1;

args.sql:
SELECT ogc_fid, artype, arjordbr, arveget, ST_Area(wkb_geometry) AS area, wkb_geometry
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" a
WHERE a.wkb_geometry && ST_MakeEnvelope(-4877.920349811553,6564066.379996766,-42633.16059738374,6610354.179999795,25833)
AND (artype::text IN ('20','30','50') OR arjordbr::text IN ('24','25') OR arveget::text IN ('98','99'))
LIMIT 5000;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE LOWER(kommunenavn) ILIKE '%stavanger%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT DISTINCT artype, arjordbr, arveget
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" a
WHERE a.wkb_geometry && ST_MakeEnvelope(-4877.920349811553,6564066.379996766,-42633.16059738374,6610354.179999795,25833)
LIMIT 500;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '1103';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT ogc_fid, artype, arjordbr, arveget, ST_Area(wkb_geometry) AS area, wkb_geometry
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" a
WHERE a.wkb_geometry && ST_MakeEnvelope(-4877.920349811553,6564066.379996766,-42633.16059738374,6610354.179999795,25833)
AND (artype::text IN ('20','30','50') OR arjordbr::text IN ('24','25') OR arveget::text IN ('98','99'))
LIMIT 5000;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "wkb_geometry"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["teigid"]
-- metric_as: "count"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: sort
-- source_step: 6
-- order_by: "teigid"
-- order_direction: "asc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: limit
-- source_step: 7
-- limit: 10
